Title: Enterprise Intent Layer reference architecture
Alt text: Layered HANA-X Copilot architecture from user intent through CopilotKit, AG-UI, LangGraph, policy and context, governed MCP tools, released SAP interfaces, and SAP S/4HANA.
Notes: Governed redraw derived from the founder-submitted concept; submitted raster identity and SHA recorded under Source/Received/SOURCE-LOCATION.md.

Title: HANA-X Agentic OS to Copilot to SAP S/4HANA
Intent-to-execution agent lifecycle
Notes: Intent, context, planning, policy, tools, approval, audit

Title: Intent refinement and clarification sequence
Alt text: Decision flow showing intent analysis, completeness checks, up to three clarification turns, plan review, approval, execution, fallback, and safe stop.

Title: Knowledge and memory architecture
Alt text: Knowledge pipeline with immutable originals, PostgreSQL canonical records, transactional outbox, Qdrant indexes, optional LightRAG and preference memory, and LangGraph retrieval.
Notes: Shows authoritative records versus rebuildable retrieval indexes.

Title: Governed document and web ingestion
Alt text: Governed pipeline from file upload or URL through validation, security and rights checks, original preservation, Docling or Crawl4AI normalization, classification, indexing, and retrieval publication.
Notes: Crawl4AI is governed by domain, SSRF, provenance, rights, and approval controls.

Title: SAP identity and tool-execution flow
Alt text: Flow from authenticated user through enterprise identity, agent context, policy and approval, MCP tool service, SAP interface, SAP authorization, result, and audit evidence.
Notes: Pattern family; exact flow varies by S/4HANA edition and customer identity architecture.
